highlights.text: I wrote at 4pm Monday “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote Tuesday at 4pm: “The bull case though is that ES can fill it out the upside and test 6360, 6366, then 6371-74.
They are to numerous to discuss in this intro by two of those core blocks are: 1) My core setup, the Failed Breakdown This is how institutions accumulate/enter trades.
However, when ES does back-test, it needs to put in that trap/Failed Breakdown.

In todays newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a very high quality Failed Breakdown we had on Tuesday where we sold to 6319 as discussed above, lost and recovered last Friday’s low in the process, then squeezed into this weeks highs.
This was a textbook Failed Breakdown.

post_title: This Week's Rally is What A Triangle Breakout Looks Like in SPX. But Can It Close The Week Green? July 25 Plan
